# `goals` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `Goal`

```prisma
model Goal {
  id                String             @id @default(uuid())
  userId            String
  deviceId          String?
  name              String
  description       String?
  targetAmount      Decimal            @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  currentAmount     Decimal            @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  targetDate        DateTime
  category          String?
  isGroupGoal       Boolean            @default(false)
  syncStatus        String             @default("synced")
  clientRequestId   String?            @unique
  createdAt         DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime           @updatedAt
  deletedAt         DateTime?
  user              User               @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  goalContributions GoalContribution[]
  goalMembers       GoalMember[]

  @@index([syncStatus])
  @@index([targetDate])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `GoalContribution`

```prisma
model GoalContribution {
  id         String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId     String
  goalId     String
  accountId  String
  amount     Decimal  @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  date       DateTime
  memberName String?
  status     String?
  notes      String?
  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt  DateTime @updatedAt
  account    Account  @relation(fields: [accountId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  goal       Goal     @relation(fields: [goalId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  user       User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([accountId])
  @@index([date])
  @@index([goalId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `GoalMember`

```prisma
model GoalMember {
  id        String    @id @default(uuid())
  goalId    String
  userId    String? // Optional: may be a non-registered participant
  name      String
  email     String?
  phone     String?
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt DateTime?
  goal      Goal      @relation(fields: [goalId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([goalId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@schema("public")
}
```
